testcase.name: [2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-001] Guardian interrupt pauses debate and ack resumes @p0 @smoke
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-002] Critical interrupt ends debate with no resume @p0
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-003] Guardian message renders as centered Violet-600 bubble @p1
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-004] Guardian overlay shows verdict and reason when active @p1
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-005] Grayscale filter applied to stream when paused @p1
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-006] Rapid sequential pauses update guardian message @p2
[2-2] Guardian Pause & Resume › [2-2-E2E-007] Resume after ack clears paused state completely @p2
[2-3] Guardian UI Overlay — The Freeze › [2-3-E2E-001] Visual freeze — grayscale + overlay with correct content @p0 @smoke
[2-3] Guardian UI Overlay — The Freeze › [2-3-E2E-002] Click-outside and Escape blocking for critical @p0
[2-3] Guardian UI Overlay — The Freeze › [2-3-E2E-003] Full interrupt → acknowledge flow via WebSocket @p0
